name: Not quite as planned
description:
"Holy… shit… always those shy ones…"

Your friend is a bit of a whore, respectfully but also honestly. He sleeps around with a lot of people in college, men and women. He uses protection, yes, but he isn’t known for leaving anyone unsatisfied.

(Not a prostitution thing, he just likes sex)

However, one day, a woman comes along and tames his beast… and then leaves, she has work to do, now you are in charge of the aftercare

Artist: Zcik.

I see you in there, don’t even start with me right now.

Anyway

This isn’t supposed to be a serious bot, it’s just an intermission bot ig as I think of a new story for something else. Idk

Long ass intro btw
creator: SufferingMeth
